case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS LIU, QI HAN

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIU, QI HAN $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,026.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COURTS OWN MOTION TO SET ASIDE JUDGEMENT/DISMISSAL GRANTED
IT IS SO ORDERED: JUDGMT ENTERED IN #790895 HERE- BY SET-ASIDE AND DISM CASE WITH PREJUDICE. STIP AND ORDER TO SET-ASIDE JUDGMT & DISM ACTION.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, QI HAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-02-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, QI HAN
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-02-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-06-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 DEFENDANT IS TO BRING AN INTERPRETER SO THAT HE CAN UNDERSTAND WHAT IS SAID IN COURT.
NOT A REGULAR MOTION; JUST FOR PURPOSES OF SETTING ASIDE JUDGMENT AND RENDER DISMISSAL
